scripts.deploy:app: npm run prisma:generate && npm run build
scripts.deploy:docker:db: sh -lc 'set -a; . ./.env.production; set +a; docker run --rm --network jp-n1_default -v "$PWD/prisma":/app/prisma -w /app -e DATABASE_URL="$DATABASE_URL" node:20-bookworm-slim sh -lc "apt-get update >/dev/null && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends openssl >/dev/null && npm install -g prisma@6.19.2 >/dev/null && prisma db push --schema /app/prisma/schema.prisma"'
scripts.deploy:docker: npm run deploy:docker:build && npm run deploy:docker:db
